title: Faith
why_this_song: Faith by George Michael (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Because I got to have faith, faith
I got to have faith, faith, faith
Before this river becomes an ocean
Before you throw my heart back on the floor
Oh baby, I've reconsidered my foolish notion
Well, I need someone to hold me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "faith" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "faith" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "because" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "because" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I guess it would be nice
Because I got to have faith, faith
Because I've gotta have faith, faith, faith

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If I could touch your body
Before this river becomes an ocean

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Faith" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Faith" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Faith" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Faith", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Faith" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Faith" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
